~ Arihant Halagi..
: Greetings from IEEE UVCE! ️ We are happy to announce the winners of Silic-O-hack at IMPETUS 26.0!  Winners: Team Silicon Syndicate (BIT) Members:  Sudhanva Kulkarni - 2nd year ECE Sridevi - 2nd year ECE H R Omansh - 2nd year ECE Runners Up: Team Nova (UVCE) Members:  Jeevashree S - 2nd year ECE  Jitha Jayesh - 2nd year ECE Parthjit Singh - 2nd year ECE Congratulations to both the winners! A big thank you to all the participants for being a part of Silic-O-hack. Your creativity, technical skills and enthusiasm made the event truly exciting and memorable. We believe that this experience challenged your problem-solving abilities and inspired you to continue innovating. Keep learning and striving for excellence!

Hi *PRAMOD KUMAR G,*  *Applications for MTech / ME at MIT, MAHE Manipal are closing in just 7 hours*. If you’re planning to specialise in engineering, this is your final chance to apply. *Submit your application before the deadline.* Regards, Admissions Office Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) Reply ‘STOP’ to unsubscribe
IIT Mandi CCE
Yesterday
Dear Candidate,  This is a system-generated update: of our final reminder regarding the application for HIMSHIKHAR 2026 Summer Residential Program at IIT Mandi. :: This is not an online course - it is a fully residential, 2-month immersive program on the Himalayan campus of IIT Mandi. Because this is an offline experience, we have a strict cohot limit of only 250 seats. :: Please review and complete Your Application & Book Test Slot Now - https://tinyurl.com/IITMandiHimshikhar. :: The currently available benefits include: Once you complete your test slot booking, you will receive a unique Referral QR Code. This QR code can be redeemed once to allow a friend or family member to take the entrance test at No cost. We only encourage you to share this with someone you genuinely believe is ready for the rigors and rewards of an IIT-level residency. :: Please note: This is a limited seat opportunity don't let this chance slip away. Once the 250 seats are gone, the window for this cohort closes. ::

Saturday
~ Thanu
: 
Greetings from IEEE UVCE! "Every conclusion marks the beginning of new possibilities!" As an incredible journey comes to an end, IMPETUS 26.0 has truly been a celebration of innovation, creativity, and technical brilliance. IEEE UVCE warmly invites you to join us for the Closing Ceremony as we celebrate the remarkable ideas, inspiring participants, and unforgettable moments that made this technical extravaganza a success. Join us as we conclude this exciting chapter, acknowledge the outstanding talents, and celebrate the spirit of innovation together! Date: 14th March, 2026 Time: 4:30 PM Venue: Sir M. Visvesvaraya Senate Hall, UVCE For further queries, contact:  Mohith Monnappa T A: +91 63609 65351 Bharath P Nambiar: +91 91089 40867 Vaishnavi N Mahadev: +91 93803 82355

5/3/2026
On 4-3-26, the team Impetus 14 went to Atria Institute of Technology for the campaigning of Impetus 26. We interacted with around 60 to 80 students, and the response from them was cordial and enthusiastic. We also placed the event poster on the main notice board of Atria Institute of Technology to spread awareness about the event. Although registrations did not happen immediately, the interaction with the students was positive. Based on their interest, we are confident that students from Atria Institute of Technology will register for the event in the future. P.S.: The overall campaigning experience was very good and encouraging.2:48 am

int enablePin = 9; int in1 = 8; int in2 = 7; void setup() { pinMode(enablePin, OUTPUT); pinMode(in1, OUTPUT); pinMode(in2, OUTPUT); } void loop() { // Motor forward direction digitalWrite(in1, HIGH); digitalWrite(in2, LOW); // Slow speed analogWrite(enablePin, 80); delay(3000); // Medium speed analogWrite(enablePin, 150); delay(3000); // Full speed analogWrite(enablePin, 255); delay(3000); }4:00 am

ಹೆಣ್ಣಾ ಗಿ, ಮಗಳಾಗಿ, ತಾಯಿಯಾಗಿ, ಅಕ್ಕ - ತಂಗಿಯಾಗಿ, ಗೆಳತಿಯಾಗಿ, ಹೆಂ ಡತಿಯಾಗಿ, ಮನೆಯೊಳಗಿನ ನಗುವಾಗಿ, ಮನದೊಳಗಿನ ಒಲುಮೆಯಾಗಿ, ಸರ್ವ ರಿಗೂ ಬೆಳಕಾಗಿ, ಅರ್ಹ ರಿಗೆಸ್ಫೂ ರ್ತಿ ಯಾಸೆಲೆಯಾಗಿ, ಕಷ್ಟ ಕಾರ್ಪ ಣ್ಯ ಗಳನ್ನೆ ಲ್ಲ ಎದುರಿಸುವ ಯೋ ಗಿಣಿಯಾಗಿ, ಸಂಸಾರವೆಂ ಬ ಸಾಗರದಲ್ಲಿ ಸಾಮರಸ್ಯ ಸಹಬಾಳ್ವೆಯನ್ನು ಸಂಭಾಳಿಸುವ ಸುಪ್ತ ಶಕ್ತಿಯಾಗಿ, ಮಕ್ಕ ಳನ್ನು ಹೆತ್ತು ಹೊತ್ತು ಶಿಸ್ತಿನಿಂ ದಲೇ ಸಂರಕ್ಷಿ ಸುವ ಗುರುವಾಗಿ, ಮನೆಯ ಒಳಗೂ-ಹೊರಗೂ ಗಂಡಿನಜೊತೆ ಹೆಗಲಿಗೆ ಹೆಗಲಾಗಿ ಸಾಥ್ ಕೊಟ್ಟು , ಜೀ ವ ಜಗತ್ತಿ ಗೆ ಉಸಿರಾಗಿ ಕ್ಷಮಾಯಧರಿತ್ರಿಯಾದವಳೇ ಹೆಣ್ಣು ! ವಿಶ್ವ ಮಹಿಳಾ ದಿನಾಚರಣೆಯ ಹಾರ್ದಿ ಕ ಶುಭಾಶಯಗಳ11:42 pm
